description: bind:map on svelte-maplibre-gl conflicts with exactOptionalPropertyTypes — type mismatch on optional Map property
resolution: Use onload={(e) => { mapInstance = e.target as unknown as MapLibreMap; }} instead of bind:map

content: Svelte 5 stores use .svelte.ts files with $state/$derived/$effect rune globals — ESLint must declare these globals for both .svelte and .svelte.ts file blocks

name: exactOptionalPropertyTypes spread
description: Use ...(val !== undefined ? { key: val } : {}) for optional spread props instead of direct assignment to satisfy exactOptionalPropertyTypes

content: Tailwind 4: @import 'tailwindcss' in app.css, @tailwindcss/vite plugin in vite.config.ts, no tailwind.config.js needed
tRPC 11 Fetch adapter at /api/trpc/[...trpc] — all API routes go through tRPC routers, not SvelteKit endpoints. Auth via Lucia v3 + @lucia-auth/adapter-drizzle with text PK sessions

description: MapLibre 5 + esbuild: class fields not transpiled correctly by default
resolution: Set build.target: 'es2022' in vite.config.ts for native class fields without helper transforms

description: ESLint OOM when parsing .svelte-kit directory or using parserOptions.project with TypeScript
resolution: Global ignores FIRST (standalone { ignores: [...] }) to prevent .svelte-kit scanning. No parserOptions.project — syntax-only rules avoid TypeScript OOM

title: superjson transformer for tRPC
rationale: tRPC serializes Date objects as ISO strings over JSON, causing type mismatches (Layer.createdAt: Date but runtime string). superjson preserves Date/Map/Set through JSON round-trips. Added to both server init.ts and client trpc.ts. Eliminates all Date-serialization casts and lets component interfaces use Date directly.

content: Root eslint.config.js must exclude apps/web/** (has its own Svelte-aware config) and scripts/** (no tsconfig, runs via tsx). Without this, 39 errors from parserOptions.project mismatches, missing rune globals, and double-linting.

title: shared-map-operations
rationale: Extracted createMap/deleteMap/cloneMap/createFromTemplate to lib/server/maps/operations.ts. Both tRPC routers and dashboard form actions call shared functions with audit logging. Audit fires AFTER successful mutation, not before.

title: upload-editor-access
rationale: Upload endpoint now allows editor collaborators, not just map owners. Uses same owner-fast-path + collaborator check pattern as requireMapAccess.

name: annotation-thread-ui
description: AnnotationPanel thread expand/collapse: uses $state<string|null> for expandedAnnotationId + replyingTo. Thread replies fetched via {#await trpc.annotations.getThread.query({rootId})} inline in template — no extra reactive store needed.

name: annotation-object-service-pattern
description: Annotation service layer pattern: service.ts owns all business logic (access checks, validation, changelog), tRPC router is a thin adapter. Service uses typedExecute with raw SQL and rowToObject mapping for snake_case DB columns to camelCase AnnotationObject. exactOptionalPropertyTypes requires spread pattern in tRPC adapter: ...(val !== undefined ? { key: val } : {})

name: sidepanel-accordion-pattern
description: SidePanel accordion pattern: SidePanel.svelte uses Svelte 5 Snippet type for content injection. Sections defined as array of {id, label, icon, count?, content: Snippet}. One-open-at-a-time accordion controlled by parent via activeSection prop + onchange callback. Child components accept embedded?: boolean to hide their own headers when inside SidePanel.

title: unified-sidebar-consolidation
rationale: Consolidated 5 independent right-side panels (Annotations, Comments, Geoprocessing, Measure, Activity) into a single SidePanel accordion with 3 sections. Comments merged into AnnotationPanel (UI-only, separate backend). Measure merged into Analysis section with sub-tabs. Collaborators moved into ShareDialog. Design mode (Ctrl+backslash) hides everything except map+drawing tools.

name: connected-actions-wiring
description: Connected actions pattern: MapEditor coordinates draw→annotate→measure→activity via activeFeature state, featurePickMode, pendingMeasurementAnnotation, and logActivity helper. DrawActionRow auto-dismisses after 8s. Badge indicators use centroid() + declarative GeoJSONSource/CircleLayer/SymbolLayer. Measurement annotations render as dashed LineLayer/FillLayer with label SymbolLayer.

name: vector-tile-pagination
description: Large layers (>10k features) use Martin vector tiles for rendering + server-side paginated DataTable. VECTOR_TILE_THRESHOLD extracted to shared constant in lib/utils/constants.ts. MapEditor skips loadLayerData for large layers, uses viewport-based listPaged endpoint with debounced moveend + abort controller. DataTable supports mode='client'|'server' with pagination controls.

name: admin-trpc-router
description: Admin tRPC router pattern: adminProcedure middleware in init.ts (extends protectedProcedure with isAdmin check). Admin router at routers/admin.ts with CRUD procedures. Soft-delete via disabledAt column + session invalidation via lucia.invalidateUserSessions(). Duplicate email handled by catching PostgreSQL 23505 error code.

title: Soft-delete users via disabledAt timestamp
rationale: Hard delete causes cascade issues with maps, comments, audit logs (all have userId FKs with onDelete: set null). Soft-delete is reversible and preserves data integrity.

description: changelog.ts objectSnapshot() calls .toISOString() on createdAt/updatedAt but typedExecute returns raw SQL rows where timestamps are strings, not Date objects — crashes with 500 on annotations.create
resolution: Use instanceof Date guard: obj.createdAt instanceof Date ? obj.createdAt.toISOString() : String(obj.createdAt)

name: annotation-hover-tooltips
description: Annotation map layers (pins, regions, badges, measurements) use onmouseenter/onmouseleave on svelte-maplibre-gl layer components for hover tooltips. Separate hoveredAnnotation state from selectedAnnotation (click). AnnotationContent accepts compact prop for brief hover preview vs full click popup.

name: drawing-mode-cleanup
description: Three drawing flows (direct draw, annotation-after-draw, draw-after-annotation) share overlapping state flags (annotationRegionMode, featurePickMode, activeFeature, pendingMeasurementAnnotation). Centralized clearInteractionModes(keep?) function resets all flags except the one being entered. Called on: sidebar section change, design mode toggle, mode entry points, Escape key, and annotation completion.

DrawActionRow Annotate handler bug: clearInteractionModes() nullifies activeFeature before pickedFeature assignment reads it (MapEditor.svelte line 722-724). pickedFeature always ends up undefined from this path.
resolution: Capture activeFeature into a local const before calling clearInteractionModes(), then use the captured value for pickedFeature assignment.

title: Discriminated union for interaction modes
rationale: Research shows discriminated union pattern (type InteractionMode = idle|drawRegion|pickFeature|measure|activeFeature) is better than 5 scattered boolean flags. Current clearInteractionModes(keep?) works and is tested (35 tests) but doesn't enforce mutual exclusivity at the type level. Zero bundle cost vs 33KB XState. Compiler enforces exhaustive handling. Data bundled with mode variant prevents desync. Estimated 3-4 hour refactor.

description: Discriminated union in Svelte 5 effects: effects that read interactionState.type as a guard AND write interactionState create infinite loops — each write creates a new object reference, triggering re-run.
resolution: Use untrack() for all guard reads of the union state in effects that also write to it. When collapsing two independent flags (mode boolean + data) into a single union variant, conditionals that depended on the boolean must add a data-presence check (e.g. && !geometry) to replicate the old behavior.

content: @tanstack/svelte-query v6 is an ESM-only package — 'node -e require()' verification fails with ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED. Verify installation by checking package.json presence instead.

QueryClient singleton in src/lib/utils/query-client.ts (staleTime:30s, gcTime:5min, refetchOnWindowFocus:false, retry:1) wrapped by QueryClientProvider in (app)/+layout.svelte — all app routes share one client.

vite build fails in worktrees without .env (PUBLIC_MARTIN_URL missing from $env/static/public) — pre-existing env issue. Use npx vitest run to verify code correctness instead of vite build in CI-less worktrees.

name: tanstack-query-mutation-invalidation
description: TanStack Query mutation pattern in Svelte 5: createMutation(() => ({...})) at component top-level, with onSuccess invalidating queryClient.invalidateQueries(). Optimistic updates use onMutate to cancel queries + snapshot previous data + setQueryData, onError to rollback, onSettled to invalidate. Replace manual loadX() + $state with createQuery $derived values.

name: derived-annotation-pins-from-query-cache
description: Annotation pins derived from TanStack Query cache via $derived instead of manual loadAnnotationPins() + $effect. The annotationPinsQuery shares the same queryKey as AnnotationPanel's annotationsQuery, so mutations in AnnotationPanel automatically update MapEditor's pin/region/measurement GeoJSON.

title: onannotationsaved replaces onannotationchange
rationale: Data refresh handled by query cache invalidation. Callback now only manages interaction state transitions on created action.

name: transitionTo-centralized-mode-transitions
description: transitionTo() centralizes InteractionState + tool coordination: atomically sets interactionState and implied activeTool (drawRegion→polygon, pickFeature→select, idle from annotation modes→select). Uses untrack() internally for safe  usage. Replaces 17 manual transition sites.

name: annotation-thread-component
description: AnnotationThread.svelte: createQuery with queryKeys.annotations.thread({annotationId}), fetches via trpc.annotations.getThread, renders replies with AnnotationContent, auth-gated delete buttons. Delete mutation must invalidate ['annotations','getThread'] prefix to refresh thread UI.

MapLibre vector tile features have integer IDs, not database UUIDs — feat.id from queryRenderedFeatures is tile-internal. Must resolve via properties._id (GeoJSON source) or properties.id (Martin vector tiles)
resolution: Added resolveFeatureId() helper in MapEditor that checks properties._id then properties.id before falling back to feat.id

name: drawing-store-lifecycle
description: drawingStore at lib/stores/drawing.svelte.ts owns Terra Draw init/start/stop with generation-guarded async imports. Components wire event handlers (finish, save, measure) via drawingStore.instance after init resolves. Discriminated union DrawingState (idle|importing|ready|stopped) drives UI disabled states via drawingStore.isReady.

name: annotation-form-auto-open
description: AnnotationPanel auto-open pattern: $effect blocks that react to external props (pickedFeature, regionGeometry, pendingMeasurement) by setting formAnchorType + showForm=true when form is closed. Guard with !showForm to avoid clobbering in-progress forms. All three anchor context flows (feature pick, region draw, measurement) follow the same pattern.

name: feature-orphan-flagging
description: Feature orphan flagging: flagOrphanedAnnotations() in annotation service sets anchor.featureDeleted=true via jsonb_set on feature-anchored annotations. Called from features.delete tRPC procedure. AnnotationContent renders dimmed state with 'Feature deleted' badge when flag is set.

Effect prop callback cycle: $effect blocks that call prop callbacks (oncountchange, onrequestfeaturepick) track those callbacks as reactive dependencies. When parent re-renders produce new closure references, this creates effect_update_depth_exceeded.
resolution: Wrap callback invocations in untrack() so only data dependencies (e.g. annotationList.length, formAnchorType) are tracked, not the callback closures themselves.

name: localStorage-restore-guard
description: localStorage persistence with restore guard: Use a filterRestored flag to prevent save-effect from firing before the load-effect completes, avoiding reactive loops when persisting state to localStorage

name: tanstack-query-auth-guard
description: TanStack Query enabled guard for auth: Add enabled: !!userId to queries calling protectedProcedure to prevent silent auth errors on unauthenticated share/embed pages

title: silent-success-eliminated
rationale: Walking persona flows revealed asymmetric feedback: failures toasted but successes silent. Users anxious about whether actions worked.

name: viewport-persistence
description: Map viewport (center, zoom, bearing, pitch) persisted to localStorage per mapId on moveend, restored on mount. Key: felt-viewport-{mapId}. Shape-validated on load with silent fallback.

name: annotation-form-disabled-hint
description: Annotation form submit button uses complex disabled logic across 8 conditions (formType variants + anchor type). When adding validation hints, mirror the same disabled condition to keep hint and button state in sync.

name: annotation-anchor-update
description: Annotation service update() accepts optional anchor field for anchor-type conversion (e.g. feature→point). Uses sql.join for dynamic SET clauses. Schema, router, and service must all be updated together.

title: brownfield-hardening-iter-1-2-complete
rationale: 10 tasks fixing: cancel-reset, stale-image-url, orphaned-geometry-cleanup, import-poll-timeout, validation-hints, orphan-repair-action, escape-cancel-draw, tool-switch-confirm, blob-url-race. Annotation update schema extended to support anchor changes for orphan repair.

description: oncountchange effect in AnnotationPanel caused effect_update_depth_exceeded during map tile loading — callback triggered parent re-render which re-triggered the effect
resolution: Added previous-value deduplication guard (_prevAnnotationCount/_prevCommentCount) alongside existing untrack() wrapper

name: stable-maplibre-center-prop
description: Stable center prop for svelte-maplibre-gl: inline object literals like center={{ lng, lat }} create new references every render, causing synchronous setCenter→moveend→store→re-render loops (effect_update_depth_exceeded). Use a memoized $state + $effect.pre guard that only creates a new object when coordinates actually differ. Pair with equality guards in setViewport to prevent store churn on identical values.
setActiveTool dedup guard: new Set() creates fresh reference triggering spurious reactivity even when selectedFeatureIds was empty
resolution: Add same dedup guard as clearSelection(): skip writes when _selectedFeature is null and _selectedFeatureIds.size === 0

description: transitionTo missing featureSelected case left activeTool as drawing tool after handleFeatureDrawn
resolution: Add case featureSelected to transitionTo switch to reset tool to select
